items.claim: Luke Riley is a faster kickboxer who enters range more quickly than Kai Kamaka.
items.quote: He's a pretty speedy kickboxer. He enters range pretty fast and finds good straights

items.claim: Kai Kamaka relies primarily on wide, pressure-heavy overhand punches.
items.quote: I feel like Kai Kamaka, his best shots are the wider punches... pressure heavy overhand shots.

items.claim: Luke Riley's ability to close the gap is superior to Kai Kamaka's.
items.quote: his ability to close the gap, I think, is a superior element to Kai Kamaka's gap closing abilities

items.claim: Adrian Yanez has faster hands and slicker boxing combinations than Cody Garbrandt.
items.quote: Yanez's hands are fast. He's got slick boxing combinations.

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt is a step slower than he was in his prime.
items.quote: Cody Garbrandt is a step slower than he was in his prime.

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt has become more passive in exchanges compared to his earlier career.
items.quote: he's a bit passive in the exchanges a bit more than he was in his youth.

items.claim: Gable Steveson is capable of taking Alicia Ellison down at will due to his wrestling background.
items.quote: He's going to be able to take Alicia Ellison down at will.
He's got a pretty long reach, 78 inches.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker's jaw was broken during his fight against Khamzat Chimaev.
items.quote: Khamzat Chimaev broke his face with a crank, destroyed his jaw.
